allow: Bash(jq "paths\(scalars\) as $path | if getpath\($path\) == ""35:950"" then $path else empty end")
Bash(jq ".document.children[1].children[14] | map\(select\(.id == ""36:1919""\)\) | .[0] | .children | map\({id: .id, name: .name, type: .type, y: .absoluteBoundingBox.y}\)")

Bash(jq ".. | objects | select\(.id == ""36:1919"" or .parent.id == ""36:1919""\) | .children[]? | select\(.type == ""RECTANGLE"" and .name | contains\(""image""\)\) | {id: .id, name: .name, x: .absoluteBoundingBox.x, y: .absoluteBoundingBox.y, width: .absoluteBoundingBox.width, height: .absoluteBoundingBox.height}")

Bash(jq ".. | objects | select\(.id == ""36:1919""\) | .children | map\(select\(.type == ""RECTANGLE""\)\) | sort_by\(.absoluteBoundingBox.width\) | reverse | .[] | {id: .id, name: .name, x: .absoluteBoundingBox.x, y: .absoluteBoundingBox.y, width: .absoluteBoundingBox.width, height: .absoluteBoundingBox.height, hasImage: \(.fills[0].type == ""IMAGE""\)}")

Bash(jq ".. | objects | select\(.type == ""FRAME"" and .absoluteBoundingBox.y >= 13350 and .absoluteBoundingBox.y <= 13500\) | {id: .id, name: .name, x: .absoluteBoundingBox.x, y: .absoluteBoundingBox.y, width: .absoluteBoundingBox.width, height: .absoluteBoundingBox.height, children: \(.children | length\)}")

Bash(jq ".. | objects | select\(.type == ""FRAME"" and .absoluteBoundingBox.y >= 13000 and .absoluteBoundingBox.y <= 13800\) | {id: .id, name: .name, x: .absoluteBoundingBox.x, y: .absoluteBoundingBox.y, width: .absoluteBoundingBox.width, height: .absoluteBoundingBox.height, children: \(.children | length\)}")

Bash(jq ".. | objects | select\(.id == ""36:1919""\) | .children | map\(select\(.absoluteBoundingBox.y < 13800\)\) | map\({id: .id, name: .name, type: .type, x: .absoluteBoundingBox.x, y: .absoluteBoundingBox.y, width: .absoluteBoundingBox.width, height: .absoluteBoundingBox.height}\)")

Bash(jq ".. | objects | select\(.id == ""37:2033""\) | {layoutMode: .layoutMode, primaryAxisAlignItems: .primaryAxisAlignItems, counterAxisAlignItems: .counterAxisAlignItems, primaryAxisSizingMode: .primaryAxisSizingMode, counterAxisSizingMode: .counterAxisSizingMode, itemSpacing: .itemSpacing, paddingLeft: .paddingLeft, paddingRight: .paddingRight, paddingTop: .paddingTop, paddingBottom: .paddingBottom}")
